hero.title: Join Mōchirīī
hero.intro: Mōchirīī is a quiet, active guild home for players who enjoy relaxed company, simple coordination, and small greetings that matter. Join through Discord, share your in-game name and time zone, learn the guild rhythm, and step into events when you feel ready.

steps.title: The Joining Path
intro: These steps carry you from first hello to your first smooth run. Leaders handle setup; you bring your in-game name, time zone, and a little warmth while roles are assigned.

items.title: Enter the Hall
items.description: Join Discord and let a mod know you are here for the guild. Verification opens the wider server, and the game channels appear once the right role is set. If you feel stuck, DM a mod or ask in game; one clear greeting can open the door.

items.title: Read the Codex & Ranks
items.description: Skim the Codex and Ranks pages so you know our tone, basic etiquette, leadership path, and how support works before you settle in.

items.title: Share your IGN & time zone
items.description: Post your in-game name and time zone so leaders can match you with the right channels, roles, and event windows. Mōchirīī is global, so clear time zones help everyone avoid guesswork.

items.title: Receive your starting rank
items.description: A leader gives your starting rank and points you to the channels, roles, and weekly notes that matter first.

items.title: Join an event
items.description: Pick an upcoming event, RSVP if planning is needed, and show up when you can. Ask questions early so the run starts calmly and everyone can share the road.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
body: Join Discord, request WWM access, and post your IGN plus time zone.
Read the Codex, then RSVP to an upcoming event if your schedule allows. A little presence warms the hall quickly, and questions are welcome.

checklist.title: New Cupcake Checklist
checklist.intro: A quick way to step in prepared, calm, and easy to welcome.

items.title: Join the Discord
items.text: Use Discord for announcements, event planning, and the clearest path into the guild home.
items.label: Open Discord

items.title: Know your in-game name or UID
items.text: Have your character name or UID ready so leadership can find you quickly and welcome you by name.

items.title: Read the Codex
items.text: Review the guild's conduct, values, and expectations before you settle in.
items.label: Read the Codex

items.title: Check event expectations
items.text: Events are announced as scheduled. Join when you can, speak up when life gets busy, and keep the atmosphere friendly.
items.label: View Events

items.title: Say hello
items.text: A simple greeting helps everyone recognize you; small welcomes become the start of shared runs.

culture.title: Expectations & Culture
intro: Mōchirīī stays comfortable through courtesy, patient effort & clear communication. Skill grows over time; care can show up in the first message.

cards.title: Respect & kindness
cards.description: Keep chat welcoming, assume good intent & treat every member as someone you may share the road with for a long time.

cards.title: Activity rhythm
cards.description: Participation stays flexible. Consistent presence, RSVPs for planned runs, and clear notice during breaks matter more than marathon sessions.

cards.title: Helping new members
cards.description: Questions belong here. Veterans share tips, builds & mechanics with patience. Leaders step in when guidance helps.

cards.title: Events & updates
cards.description: Events and announcements live in Discord as well as on the website, with pinned notes for clarity. RSVP early when asked and follow posted requirements.

notes.title: Notes
body: Voice chat is optional unless an event post says otherwise. Discord is the clearest place for roles, announcements, and coordination.
Need a break? Tell a leader before a longer Cupcake nap so roles and expectations stay clear.
If you feel lost, tag a leader. Getting unstuck quickly keeps the game light and the hall welcoming.
